series_metadata.series_title: Official TRAC Major New Construction Program List
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains the official Transportation Review Advisory Council (TRAC) annual Major New Construction Program list and all working papers (draft list, scoring sheets, etc.) associated with the list. This list is used to help determine construction programs that could be funded by ODOT.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain working paper documents (draft lists, scoring sheets, etc.) until final list has been approved, then destroy. Retain Annual Lists for 5 years then microfilm. ; Microform: Retain microfilm until obsolete or of no administrative value., Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Trash
